# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules
- Follow naming conventions

## Project-Specific Rules
- ILMerge binaries committed to source in Tools\ILMerge\ are intentional and should remain as-is. Do not suggest removing them.
- The pipeline YAML file should stay in the repository root, not in .github/workflows/. The project uses Azure DevOps Pipelines, not GitHub Actions.
